title: Tom Halliburton
compiled_truth: Tom Halliburton is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-03-08 to 2001-11-20), Tom Halliburton sent 8 and received 137 emails, totalling 145 interactions. Top correspondents: [Vince Kaminski](people/vince-kaminski) (5), [Zimin Lu](people/zimin-lu) (3), [Pinnamaneni Krishnarao](people/pinnamaneni-krishnarao) (2), [Jorge Gumucio](people/jorge-gumucio) (2), [J Kaminski](people/j-kaminski) (2). Mailbox folders observed: deleted_items, inbox.
